case_title: LISA ROMERO VS. FCA US, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FCA US, LLC'S DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER CHALLENGES PLAINTIFF'S INITIAL COMPLAINT, BUT PLAINTIFF HAS NOW FILED AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. THUS, THE COURT ORDERS THE INSTANT DEMURER, WHICH CHALLENGES A SUPERSEDES PLEADING, OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FCA US, LLC'S UNOPPOSED DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) PRIOR TO THE HEARING, MOVING PARTY SHALL LODGE BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING THE ABOVE VERBATIM. NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant FCA US, LLC's unopposed Demurrer to the Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

No proposed order received. Plaintiff failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FCA US, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant FCA US, LLC's demurrer to the complaint is OFF CALENDAR.

Defendant's demurrer challenges Plaintiff's initial complaint, but Plaintiff has now filed an amended complaint. Thus, the court orders the instant demurer, which challenges a supersedes pleading, off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
